{"step_by_step_thinking": "Lichen planus is typically an autoimmune disorder and not inherited. Bullous pemphigoid is an autoimmune blistering disease that is not inherited. Pemphigus vulgaris, while not listed as an option, is an example of an inherited autoimmune blistering disease. White sponge nevus is an autosomal dominant condition characterized by white lesions in the mouth and is inherited as an autosomal dominant trait.", "answer_choice": "D"}
